settings.label: Always show Free Shipping badge
settings.info: Display 'FREE shipping on all orders' regardless of cart total. Overrides threshold.

settings.label: Free shipping threshold
settings.info: Show progress bar in cart. Set to 0 to disable. Ignored when 'Always show' is enabled.

settings.label: Show trust badges
settings.info: Display security and guarantee badges below checkout

settings.label: Hide 'Taxes and shipping calculated at checkout' text
Show delivery estimate
settings.info: Display estimated delivery date based on order time

settings.label: Processing days
settings.info: Business days to process before shipping

settings.label: Shipping days
settings.info: Business days for standard shipping

settings.label: Order cutoff time
settings.info: Orders after this time ship next business day (24h format, e.g. 14:00)

settings.label: Show low stock warnings
settings.info: Display 'Only X left!' when inventory is low

settings.label: Show upsell section
settings.info: Display 'Complete Your Setup' product recommendations

settings.label: Upsell position
settings.info: Where to display upsell products in the cart drawer

settings.label: Enable gift options
settings.info: Allow customers to add gift wrap and message

settings.label: Gift wrap price
settings.info: e.g. $5.00 (display only, actual charge handled separately)

settings.label: Show savings amount
settings.info: Display 'You're saving X!' when discounts are applied

settings.label: Include compare-at price savings
settings.info: Include savings from sale items (compare at prices)

settings.info: t:info.checkout_buttons

settings.label: Compare-at price color
settings.info: Strikethrough price color across all pages

settings.label: Sale price color
settings.info: Current price color when on sale
